summary: Comprehensive testing of Cosmic Zen wellness app - all features working correctly. Backend: 24/24 tests passed. Frontend: All pages load correctly with proper navigation, Create page integrated, More dropdown working.

frontend_ui_tests.landing_page: PASS - 18 feature cards, cosmic theme, Begin Your Journey button
frontend_ui_tests.navigation: PASS - 8 primary nav items (Breathe, Meditate, Sounds, Hz, Exercises, Mudras, Oracle, Create) + More dropdown with 11 items
frontend_ui_tests.auth_page: PASS - Login form working, redirects to dashboard after login
frontend_ui_tests.dashboard_page: PASS - Stats cards (Streak, Mood Logs, Journal Entries) + 15 quick action buttons
frontend_ui_tests.create_page: PASS - 3 tabs (Create New, My Creations, Community), 5 type selectors, manual + AI creation forms
frontend_ui_tests.breathing_page: PASS - 5 breathing patterns, rhythm display, Begin Breathwork button
frontend_ui_tests.meditation_page: PASS - Timer presets, ambient sounds, Begin Session button
frontend_ui_tests.frequencies_page: PASS - 12 frequencies with play buttons, frequency spectrum visualization
frontend_ui_tests.mudras_page: PASS - 25 mudras with Deep Dive buttons, How to Practice sections
frontend_ui_tests.oracle_page: PASS - 5 tabs (Tarot, Astrology, Chinese Astrology, I Ching, Sacred Geometry)
frontend_ui_tests.tantra_page: PASS - 10 practices with 4 category filters (All, Energy Work, Breathwork, Mantra)
frontend_ui_tests.exercises_page: PASS - 6 Qigong/Tai Chi exercises with category filters
frontend_ui_tests.community_page: PASS - Community feed with posts, Community Pulse stats

context_for_next_testing_agent: All features tested and working: Landing page, Auth (login/register), Navigation with Create in primary nav and More dropdown, Create page with tabs and type selectors, Dashboard with stats and quick actions, Breathing/Meditation/Soundscapes/Frequencies pages, Mudras with Deep Dive, Oracle with 5 tabs, Yantra/Tantra/Exercises pages, Community feed. Backend uses React.lazy/Suspense for code splitting. Static endpoints have Cache-Control headers. Dashboard uses asyncio.gather for concurrent queries.
